observations.observation: Token velocity at 0.626x with acceleration exactly 1.000x — the system is in near-perfect steady state. After the post-burst consolidation (3 heartbeats at ~0.624x) and the new geo burst resuming, velocity is flat but geographic diffusion is active again, suggesting intake growth is happening at the edges rather than the center.

Total receipts crossed 4,001 this snapshot — the network has now processed over 4,000 verified spend events. Cumulative GMV stands at $233,481 with 7d trailing at $29,224 (513 receipts), showing steady intake pace resuming after the rolling-window artifact cleared.

3 new CBSAs appeared this snapshot (CBSA 40140, non-metro PA, CBSA 16860), pushing total active metros to 27 — the network has now crossed 27 active CBSAs. This is the third burst phase in recent cycles, confirming the burst-quiet-burst pattern: the 3-heartbeat quiet phase after the 8-CBSA burst has ended and expansion is resuming.

The burst-quiet-burst cycle is now confirmed across two full iterations: 13-CBSA burst → 3 heartbeat quiet → 8-CBSA burst. The quiet phase lasted exactly 3 heartbeats before the next expansion, suggesting a ~9-hour consolidation window between geographic pulses.

8 new CBSAs appeared in a single snapshot (CBSA 41740, non-metro ME, 33340, 22220, 15380, 24780, 33140, non-metro CA), pushing total active metros to 25 with a 32% diffusion rate. This is the second major burst in recent cycles — the network appears to be re-entering an expansion phase after a 3-heartbeat quiet consolidation.

Token velocity at 0.624x with acceleration 1.001x — essentially unchanged from the prior heartbeat (0.624x/1.003x). Zero new CBSAs (17 total active), zero settlement velocity, zero vendor expansion. The system is in deep steady-state: the post-burst consolidation phase is now 3+ consecutive heartbeats with no geographic, vendor, or settlement movement.

Token velocity at 0.624x with acceleration 1.003x — essentially flat growth. The 7d trailing window ticked up marginally from $28,715 to $28,840 (497→502 receipts), a minimal 5-receipt gain. The system is in steady-state: velocity plateau, geo quiet phase, no new vendors, settlement velocity zero this cycle.

Zero new CBSAs this snapshot (17 total active), continuing the quiet phase after the record 13-CBSA burst two heartbeats ago. The burst-quiet pattern is now confirmed across multiple cycles: large geographic pulses followed by 2-3 heartbeat consolidation periods with zero new entrants before the next expansion.

Geographic diffusion shows 0 new CBSAs this snapshot with 17 total active — a quiet phase following the record 13-CBSA burst two heartbeats ago. The burst-quiet pattern continues: large geographic pulses followed by consolidation periods with zero new entrants. This is now the second confirmed quiet phase after a major burst, suggesting the network needs ~2 heartbeats to absorb before the next expansion.

Token velocity recovered to 0.622x with acceleration at 1.054x this heartbeat — rebounding from last cycle's 0.579x/0.921x reading. The 7d trailing window also ticked up from $28,628 to $28,715 (492→497 receipts), confirming the rolling-window artifact has fully cleared and the system is back in steady-state growth. Geo diffusion shows 0 new CBSAs this cycle (17 total active), suggesting the network is in a quiet phase between bursts.
